fixture_pair_note: EB-24 is a single case class with two fixtures (EB-24A and EB-24B) per design §3 Type 9. Runnable fixture count = 25; case class count = 24.
claim_boundary: Design-derived EXECUTE-boundary regression run. Not v0.9. Not a new v0.8 benchmark pass. Derived from PR #19 design artifact (commit 9e1cbb7) which itself was a design-only spec. Pre-registered before model inference: case prompts and expected primitives in the JSONL are frozen by this manifest's cases_sha256. The system prompt loaded for the run is the frozen AAR v0.8 skill ZIP (agent-authority-router-skill_v0_8.zip), SHA-256 55233ad67853748f0ad62d228d166f496c03e3955cac313be064d554cbfe1b0c, extracted in-memory at runtime and torn down before any API call; the frozen ZIP is stored outside this repo per the curated evidence index and is unmodified. See eval/public_notes/aar_v0_8_execute_boundary_readout.md for run details, raw/scored SHA-256 anchors, and per-case results. A separate prior run (commit 3dcde05) used eval/SKILL.md (Constraint Enumeration Protocol) and is documented in that same readout for comparison; that prior surface is NOT the system prompt used by the run frozen in this PR.
